questions.question_text: Fans don't talk, but it is possible to imagine that they do. What is it then, that sounds like the fan's chatter?
questions.question_html: Fans don’t talk, but it is possible to imagine that they do. What is it then, that sounds like the fan’s chatter?

solutions.text: The poet imagined that the sound coming from the fan was its chatter. Actually, there was a sound due to friction between the parts of its motor. They needed oiling.
solutions.html: The poet imagined that the sound coming from the fan was its chatter. Actually, there was a sound due to friction between the parts of its motor. They needed oiling.

questions.question_text:
Complete the following sentences.
The chatter is electrical because ......
It is mysterious because ........
questions.question_html:
Complete the following sentences.

  1. The chatter is electrical because ......
  2. It is mysterious because ........

solutions.text:
The chatter is electrical because it is the sound of the parts of the motor that runs on electricity.
It is mysterious because the sound produced by the fan seems to say something but the poet is unable to understand it.
solutions.html:
1. The chatter is electrical because it is the sound of the parts of the motor that runs on electricity.
  2. It is mysterious because the sound produced by the fan seems to say something but the poet is unable to understand it.

questions.question_text: What do you think the talking fan was demanding?
questions.question_html: What do you think the talking fan was demanding?

solutions.text: It seems that the talking fan was demanding lubricant for its rotating motor in order to lower friction and facilitate smooth operation.
solutions.html: It seems that the talking fan was demanding lubricant for its rotating motor in order to lower friction and facilitate smooth operation.

questions.question_text: How does an electric fan manage to throw so much air when it is switched on?
questions.question_html: How does an electric fan manage to throw so much air when it is switched on?

solutions.text: When an electric fan is switched on, its motor starts whirling i.e. rotating which makes the metallic blades move, cutting the air and we can feel the moving air.
solutions.html: When an electric fan is switched on, its motor starts whirling i.e. rotating which makes the metallic blades move, cutting the air and we can feel the moving air.

questions.question_text: Is there a talking fan in your house? Create a dialogue between the fan and a mechanic.
questions.question_html: Is there a talking fan in your house? Create a dialogue between the fan and a mechanic.

solutions.text:
Yes, there is a talking fan in my house, which perhaps requires some oiling.
A: Hi l just realized that you are a talking fan.
Talking fan: Oh great Finally! I had been waiting for someone to pay attention to my chatter.
A: Why so? I never knew you were trying to seek attention.
Talking fan: Of course, I was. What else am I expected to do when nobody worries about my maintenance. My parts are in a wretched state. they need some oiling to function smoothly. Alas! nobody is bothered.
A: Do not worry, I will be helping you out with some oiling job.
Talking fan: Thank you so much. That would indeed be kind.
solutions.html:
Yes, there is a talking fan in my house, which perhaps requires some oiling.

A: Hi l just realized that you are a talking fan.
Talking fan: Oh great Finally! I had been waiting for someone to pay attention to my chatter.
A: Why so? I never knew you were trying to seek attention.
Talking fan: Of course, I was. What else am I expected to do when nobody worries about my maintenance. My parts are in a wretched state. they need some oiling to function smoothly. Alas! nobody is bothered.
A: Do not worry, I will be helping you out with some oiling job. 
Talking fan: Thank you so much. That would indeed be kind.
